# ANALYSIS: V14E_BEAR_ONLY_GATE logging progress

**Filed:** 2026-06-01

**Type:** progress_update  
**Status:** LOGGING_IN_PROGRESS (OP-21 gate: N≥100 new bear-only posts with WR≥55% not yet met)

## Current logging status

As of the latest check, the V14E_BEAR_ONLY_GATE watcher is active and accumulating bear-only observations. The exact count of new bear-only observations since the watcher was set to bear-only mode (2026-05-21) is not available in this analysis. We are continuing to log and will update when N≥100 new bear-only observations with WR≥55% is achieved.

## OP-20 disclosures (for the logging effort)

1. **Account-size assumption:** The logging effort is watcher-only and does not place trades, so no account size is required for the observations.
2. **Sample bias:** The observations are collected from live market data during RTH, subject to the same biases as the live engine (e.g., data feed, timing). The sample is not shuffled or randomized; it is sequential in time.
3. **Out-of-sample:** NEEDS-OOS (the logging effort is ongoing and has not been split into IS/OOS for validation).
4. **Real-fills:** NEEDS-REAL-FILLS (the logging effort does not involve real fills; it is observation-only).
5. **Failure modes:** The watcher may fail to log observations due to data feed issues, system downtime, or changes in the market structure that make the v14e bear setup obsolete.
6. **Concentration:** Not applicable for observation logging.
